title: scrophularia scopolii var. adenocalyx
intro: Scrophularia scopolii var. adenocalyx is a variant of the Scrophularia plant, belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is also known as the Chinese figwort or Chinese dragon's mouth, and is a traditional medicinal plant in Asian cultures. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to clear heat and toxins from the body, making it a potential remedy for fever and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the root and rhizome of Scrophularia scopolii var. adenocalyx are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
